The '''Class-D cargo container''' was a six-pronged freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] and designed to be carried by [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] such as the [[cargo ferry]]. The container was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Class-D containers were considered standard equipment to transport dry goods in bulk.<ref name="XWA" /> Aside from storage capabilities, they have also been utilized as stationary targets during training simulations for TIE pilots piloting the TIE/LN starfighter.<ref name="TIE">[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]</ref>
